zh.Castle Gresley, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾卡素 格萊斯利
zh.Drakelowe, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾德拉可洛福
zh.Church Gresley, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾邱奇 格萊斯利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Godfrey Gresley Lord of Derby於1243年出生在英國德比夏爾德拉可洛福時，他的父親William Gresley37歲，母親Elizabeth Bakepuiz31歲。他於1269年與Agnes Anneys de Morton在英國德比夏爾邱奇 格萊斯利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1305年6月在他的家鄉享年62歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾德拉可洛福。

zh-hans.Castle Gresley, Derbyshire, England: 英国德比夏爾卡素 格萊斯利
zh-hans.Drakelowe, Derbyshire, England: 英国德比夏爾德拉可洛福
zh-hans.Church Gresley, Derbyshire, England: 英国德比夏爾邱奇 格萊斯利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Godfrey Gresley Lord of Derby于1243年出生在英国德比夏爾德拉可洛福时，他的父亲William Gresley37岁，母亲Elizabeth Bakepuiz31岁。他于1269年与Agnes Anneys de Morton在英国德比夏爾邱奇 格萊斯利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1305年6月在他的家乡享年62岁，埋葬在英国德比夏爾德拉可洛福。

nameMeanings.name: Gresley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Greasley
meanings: 1  English: locative name, usually from Greasley (Notts) but possibly also from Gresley (Derbys). Some of the following early bearers may alternatively belong under (2), particularly the Lancs examples.

2 Norman, English: nickname, either from Old French greslet ‘marked as by hail’, i.e. pitted or pock-marked, or Old French greslet, gresli, grailet ‘thin, slim’. In early forms, the nickname has sometimes been confused with the place-name in (1). Compare Le Gresley in Jersey and Greslé, Grêlé in France.

nameMeanings.name: Godfrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old French name Godefroy, which is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from god ‘god’ (or gōd ‘good’) + fred, frid ‘peace’. This was adopted by the Normans, and brought to England by immigrants from the Low Countries and France. It was borne by a Norman saint ( c.1066–1115 ) who became bishop of Amiens. There has been considerable confusion with Geoffrey .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Godfrey Gresley Lord of Derby was born in 1243, in Drakelowe, Derbyshire, England, his father, William Gresley, was 37 and his mother, Elizabeth Bakepuiz, was 31. He married Agnes Anneys de Morton in 1269, in Church Gresley, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in June 1305, in his hometown, at the age of 62, and was buried in Drakelowe, Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Godfrey Gresley Lord of Derby est né en 1243, à Drakelowe, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, William Gresley, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Bakepuiz, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Anneys de Morton en 1269, à Church Gresley, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en juin 1305, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Drakelowe, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Godfrey Gresley Lord of Derby 1243 in Drakelowe, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Gresley 37 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Bakepuiz 31. Er hat 1269 in Church Gresley, Derbyshire, England Agnes Anneys de Morton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb im Juni 1305 im Alter von 62 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Drakelowe, Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Godfrey Gresley Lord of Derby è nato il nel 1243 nel Drakelowe, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, William Gresley, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Bakepuiz, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Anneys de Morton nel 1269, nel Church Gresley, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel giugno 1305, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Drakelowe, Derbyshire, England.

ja.Drakelowe, Derbyshire, England: イギリスデルブイシュアイアドラケロウ
ja.Morton, Derbyshire, England: イギリスデルブイシュアイアモートン
ja.Church Gresley, Derbyshire, England: イギリスデルブイシュアイアチャーチ グレスリー
ja.lifeSummary: Godfrey Gresley Lord of Derbyが1243年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアドラケロウで生まれた時，父William Gresleyは37歳，母Elizabeth Bakepuizは31歳であった。1269年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアチャーチ グレスリーでAgnes Anneys de Mortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1305年6月に故郷で62歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアドラケロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Godfrey Gresley Lord of Derby(이)가 1243년 영국 더비실르 드라켈로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Gresley(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Bakepuiz(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1269년 영국 더비실르 c후르치 그레슬리에서 Agnes Anneys de Morton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1305년 6월 그의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 드라켈로에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Godfrey Gresley Lord of Derby nasceu em 1243, em Drakelowe, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Gresley, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Bakepuiz, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Anneys de Morton em 1269, em Church Gresley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em junho de 1305, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Drakelowe, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Godfrey Gresley Lord of Derby родился в 1243 г. в местности дрекелоу, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Gresley было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Bakepuiz, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Anneys de Morton в 1269 г. в местности чурч гресли, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер июнь 1305 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности дрекелоу, дирбишир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Godfrey Gresley Lord of Derby nació en 1243, en Drakelowe, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Gresley, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Bakepuiz, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Agnes Anneys de Morton en 1269, en Church Gresley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en junio de 1305, en su pueblo, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Drakelowe, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
